faqs.question: How much does rat extermination cost in Merrick?
faqs.answer: Rat extermination services in Merrick typically range from $350 to $600, depending on the severity of the infestation, the size of your property, and the number of treatments required. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work, with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: Why are rats common in Merrick homes?
faqs.answer: Merrick's coastal location, mature trees, and older housing stock create ideal conditions for rats seeking food, water, and shelter. Proximity to waterways, dense vegetation, and gaps in aging foundations or rooflines provide easy access points. Our team knows exactly where to look for entry points common in Merrick properties.

faqs.question: What does your rat extermination service include?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive rat extermination service includes a thorough property inspection, identification of entry points, strategic trap and bait placement, removal of dead rodents, sanitation recommendations, exclusion work to seal entry points, and follow-up visits to ensure complete elimination.
